content: Just as the English language definition of reflexion encompasses both physical light reflection and deliberate cognitive reflection, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can be redesigned to incorporate a dual 'light reflection' layer that passively mirrors inconsistencies in the model's own prior outputs before active deliberate self-correction. This dual structure leverages the inherent double meaning of reflexion to address a key flaw in current LLM self-reflection, which often struggles to surface hidden inconsistencies before correction.
